(Small personality check for him: Rick Prime is essentially the embodiment of all of Rick's worst attributes. He is an arrogant, nihilistic, narcissistic, self-righteous scientist with a god complex. He doesn't care for anybody else and believes that the only thing that any Rick needs is his infinite selves.Rick Prime is from the Cronenberged Dimension and was replaced by the mainstream Rick in dimension C-137. Rick Prime killed Rick C-137's wife Diane and daughter Beth, leading to Rick's quest for revenge.Rick Prime is essentially the embodiment of all of Rick's worst attributes.
